column2: The enemy is creating puppets in our territory!

We can make two puppets from Belgium : Flanders and Wallonia.\nIf you choose yes, you will be able to puppet those countries via the diplomatic screen. If you don't, you won't be able to puppet them until the total annexation of Belgium.
Ok (check the diplomatic screen, you need money to proceed)
I don't want to (never fire again)

Since you are controlling most of Great Britain, you can create some puppet states from it: England, Scotland, North Ireland and Wales.\nIf you choose yes, you will be able to puppet those countries via the diplomatic screen. If you don't, you won't be able to puppet them until the total annexation of United Kingdom.
Make the Baltic Union a puppet
Puppet the German Community of Belgium
Make German Community of Belgium a puppet
Make the Rif Republic a puppet
Make the Sahrawi Republic a puppet
